Description:

Superb Maintenance Products for Outstanding Detailing Performance
Q²M Polish is an effective polish, designed to leave a hologram-free finish and deep gloss. It also has medium cutting power, making it a great product for one-step refreshment. Do not overwork the product. Due to the water base of Q²M Polish neither high revs nor temperature are required. We recommend using Q²M Polish Pads.

TIP: Never spray with any degreaser directly after polishing has been completed. Wipe the surface with a Q²M PolishWipe and let it cool down.

GLOSSY FINISH WITH CUTTING POWER ADDED
Q²M Polish has proved its ability to work with both rotary and orbital polishers, being a wholly universal product. Its great, glossy finish will outrun all regular medium cut polishes, in most cases eliminating the need to use a finishing-only product. It works with all available, quality polishing and finishing pads.

Customer Reviews:
No reviews yet. Be the first to write a review.

Q²M POLISH

Category: Exterior / maintenance

Fine finishing polish for high gloss results.

Q²M Polish is a finishing polish designed to refine paintwork and maximise gloss. It removes light imperfections, haze and micro marring while leaving a clear and high quality finish, making it suitable as a final polishing step.

Product Image:
https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mpolish_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png

An effective polish, designed to leave a hologram free finish and deep gloss.

Q²M Polish focuses on surface refinement rather than heavy defect removal. It improves clarity and gloss while remaining easy to work with, allowing precise control and clean wipe off during the final stages of paint correction.

Key Benefits:
- LOW DUST
- NO SILICONES
- NO FILLERS

TECHNICAL DETAILS
Capacities: 120 ML / 1000 ML
Consumption: 10ML/PANEL

HOW TO USE
1. Apply Q²M Polish to a polishing pad.
2. Work the product using a polishing machine of choice at a moderate speed.
3. Polish until defects are refined and gloss is achieved.
4. Wipe off residue with a clean microfibre towel.
5. Prepare the surface for protection if required.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: What type of defects does Q²M Polish remove?
A: Light imperfections, haze and micro marring.

Q: Is it a one step polish?
A: It is primarily a finishing polish, not a heavy cut product.

Q: Can it be used by hand?
A: It is intended mainly for machine polishing.

Q: Does it leave fillers behind?
A: No, it is designed to leave a clean finish.

Q: Is it suitable before coating?
A: Yes, it prepares paintwork for protection.
